Container.Name: photo-culling-assistant
Container.Overview: Match RAW assets from one Immich account to final images from another Immich account, review uncertain matches, and apply RAW Found/No RAW tags to finals plus Keeper/not used tags to RAWs through the Immich API. Matching runs locally.

Config.Name: Config
Config.Description: App config, cache, manifests, and dry-run reports.

Config.Name: Immich URL
Config.Description: Immich server URL reachable from this container.

Config.Name: Immich API Key
Config.Description: Immich API key with access to read both users and apply tags.

Config.Name: App Access Token
Config.Description: Optional shared token required for API actions in the web UI. Strongly recommended on a LAN.

Config.Name: RAW User ID
Config.Description: Immich user ID that owns RAW assets.

Config.Name: Final User ID
Config.Description: Immich user ID that owns edited JPG/JPEG/PNG assets.

Config.Name: Keeper Tag
Config.Description: Tag to apply to RAW assets that have accepted final-image matches.

Config.Name: Unused RAW Tag
Config.Description: Tag to apply to RAW assets without accepted final-image matches.

Config.Name: RAW Found Final Tag
Config.Description: Tag to apply to final images with accepted RAW matches.

Config.Name: No RAW Final Tag
Config.Description: Tag to apply to final images where no RAW match can be found.

Config.Name: RAW Root
Config.Description: Optional legacy read-only RAW folder for filesystem dry-run scans.

Config.Name: Final Images Root
Config.Description: Optional legacy read-only final-image folder for filesystem dry-run scans.
